'''Vansk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Near-Human]] leader of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] organization the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]], which operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. She along with a large number of other Blackguard were killed by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]].<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Biography==
[[File:VanskBlackguard.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Vansk of the Blackguard]]
Vansk was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Near-Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who became a member of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-using organization known as the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. She became one of the most dangerous members of the group and was amongst its leadership<ref name="SoC">{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=Vansk}}</ref> along with the male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[San'sii]], who was the [[Kursk]] of the Blackguard while she was a member. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Archaeologist/Legends|Archaeologist]] called [[Mi Fon Lu]] wished to carry out research in the [[Southern Jedi Ruins]] where the Blackguard were based. Not wanting to be attacked while working there, Fon Lu hired a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to clear out the ruins and kill all Blackguard inside. Vansk was killed in the ensuing battle along with all other present members of the Blackguard including San'sii.<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Weapons and Equipment==
Vansk generally used a single-handed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with a [[Color/Legends|red]] blade in combat, but also owned a blade known as the [[Blade of the Betrayer]], which was taken as loot by the spacers who killed her. Instead of the masked uniform worn by most members of the Blackguard, Vansk wore a hooded Dark Jedi robe.<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vansk first appeared as an enemy in the [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' as part of the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|Trials of Obi-Wan]] expansion released in [[2005]]. In game she appeared as an elite enemy whom players had to kill as part of the quest "An Archaeologist's Problem." ''Star Wars Galaxies'' was shut down on [[December 15]], 2011. She also received a card in the [[Squadrons Over Corellia]] expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]] released in [[2008]]. Vansk is sometimes erroneously identified as '''Vanst''' in the game.
